name: macOS Menu Commands
description: Tests keyboard shortcuts and menu bar commands: ⌘N (new chat), ⌘D (clear), ⌘O (import), ⌘R (refresh). Maps to testMacOSMenuBarCommands, testNewChatFunctionality.

steps.description: Verify app is ready with toolbar.
Press ⌘N to create a new chat.
Wait for new chat to be reflected in UI.
Verify prompt field is empty after new chat.
Verify app remains stable after refresh command.
